action.text: if exists(select 1 from dmtk where tk = @tk and loai_tk = 1) begin select tk_cn from dmtk where tk = @tk return end

query.text: select @@fieldExternal from @@prime$partition$current a left join dmtk b on a.tk = b.tk left join dmkh c on a.ma_kh = c.ma_kh where @@whereClause order by @@orderByClause
